files.content:
MusicAcademy
Instruments Teachers Pricing Results
Instruments Teachers Pricing Results
Learn Music Online

Play Your Favorite Songs

Learn from professional musicians. Flexible lessons tailored to your pace. Play guitar, piano, vocals, and more.

Choose Your Instrument

🎸

Guitar

Acoustic, electric, and bass guitar lessons for all levels.

  • 50+ structured courses
  • Song-based learning
  • Technique videos
🎹

Piano

From beginner to advanced classical and contemporary piano.

  • 40+ courses
  • Music theory included
  • Interactive practice
🎤

Vocals

Singing lessons with breathing techniques and performance skills.

  • 30+ courses
  • Pitch training tools
  • Performance coaching
🎶

Production

Learn music production, mixing, and beat making from scratch.

  • 25+ courses
  • DAW tutorials
  • Genre-specific training

Your Learning Journey

1

Choose Your Path

Select your instrument and skill level. Get personalized recommendations.

2

Learn Step-by-Step

Follow structured lessons with video tutorials and practice exercises.

3

Practice & Master

Get feedback from instructors. Track your progress with achievements.

4

Perform & Share

Earn certificates and share your performances with the community.

Learn From Professional Musicians

James Miller

Jazz Guitarist

Grammy nominee. 25+ years teaching.

Sarah Johnson

Classical Pianist

Juilliard graduate. Performed worldwide.

Alex Chen

Music Producer

Produced for major label artists.

Emma Davis

Vocal Coach

Trained platinum-selling artists.

Simple Pricing

Starter

Perfect for beginners

Free

  • 3 beginner courses
  • Community access
  • Instructor feedback
MOST POPULAR

Premium

For serious learners

$9.99/month

  • All 150+ courses
  • Instructor feedback
  • No ads

Pro

For aspiring professionals

$19.99/month

  • Everything in Premium
  • 1-on-1 lessons
  • Recordings access

Student Results

500K+

Active students

2M+

Songs learned

95%

Continue learning

4.9/5

Rating from 50K reviews

Ready to Play Music?

Start your free trial today. No credit card required.
